data.title: Singapore's MetaComp Raises Pre-A+ Round Backed By Alibaba, Closing Total US$35 Million Pre-A Funding in 3 months to Accelerate Asia's Regulated Web2.5 Pay and Wealth[1] Group-Level Platform
data.description: In Singapore on March 12, 2026, MetaComp Pte. Ltd revealed that they, along with licensed affiliates, have successfully concluded their Pre-A+ funding round. The total amount secured in this funding round now stands at US$35 million. MetaComp is recognized as a trailblazer in unified Web2.5 payments and wealth group-level platform in Asia.

data.title: Senate approved housing bill with a decisive vote; bipartisan support amidst election-year, facing uncertainty with G.O.P. disputes.
data.description: The measure was approved by a significant margin in an unusual display of bipartisanship during an election year. However, disagreements within the G.O.P. and lack of interest from President Trump have cast doubt on its future.
